calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-07-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:08am
Judge Pro Tem Al Anolik, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Cliff Kaplan, appears through his attorney Andrew Cantor. Respondent, Corrina Seibt, appears in pro per.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Anolik.

9:10 Parties allowed to go out to review documents.
9:49 Matter resumes.

Respondent submits a bound series of documents which is not marked, but is retained.
EXHA (1) 1 page email
EXHA (2) 2 page email

Respondent is given two weeks (November 3, 2010) to submit document regarding email account establishment.

10:28am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-26-2010 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-11-2010 Continued To Aug-25-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 506

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-21-2010 Continued To Aug-11-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 506
